mapper.sql: select order_item_id, order_id, coalesce(nullif(main_order_no, ''), cast(order_id as char)) main_order_no, coalesce(nullif(sub_order_no, ''), concat(cast(order_id as char), '-', order_item_id)) sub_order_no, shop_id, shop_name, product_id, product_name, sku_id, sku_name, quantity, pay_amount, product_cost, platform_fee, ad_cost, freight_fee, refund_cost, profit_amount, order_status, pay_time, dt from dwd_order_item
mapper.select: where order_item_id = #{orderItemId}

where.if: and exists ( select 1 from erp_sales_order_item si where si.sales_id = o.sales_id and si.sub_order_no like concat('%', #{query.subOrderNo}, '%') )

and exists ( select 1 from erp_sales_order_item si where si.sales_id = o.sales_id and (si.product_name like concat('%', #{query.productName}, '%') or si.sku_name like concat('%', #{query.productName}, '%') or si.sku_code like concat('%', #{query.productName}, '%')) )

mapper.select:
select o.sales_id as salesId, o.sales_no as salesNo, o.main_order_no as mainOrderNo, o.shop_id as shopId, o.shop_name as shopName, o.order_status as orderStatus, o.fulfillment_status as fulfillmentStatus, o.total_quantity as totalQuantity, o.shipped_quantity as shippedQuantity, o.refunded_quantity as refundedQuantity, o.pay_amount as payAmount, o.refund_amount as refundAmount, o.pay_time as payTime, count(i.item_id) as itemCount, sum(case when i.quantity > i.shipped_quantity + i.refunded_quantity then 1 else 0 end) as pendingItemCount, round(if(o.total_quantity = 0, 0, (o.shipped_quantity + o.refunded_quantity) * 100 / o.total_quantity), 2) as processRate from erp_sales_order o left join erp_sales_order_item i on i.sales_id = o.sales_id
group by o.sales_id, o.sales_no, o.main_order_no, o.shop_id, o.shop_name, o.order_status, o.fulfillment_status, o.total_quantity, o.shipped_quantity, o.refunded_quantity, o.pay_amount, o.refund_amount, o.pay_time order by o.pay_time desc, o.sales_id desc

select count(*) as orderCount, ifnull(sum(o.pay_amount), 0) as payAmount, sum(case when o.fulfillment_status = 'pending' then 1 else 0 end) as pendingCount, sum(case when o.fulfillment_status = 'partial_shipped' then 1 else 0 end) as partialShippedCount, sum(case when o.fulfillment_status = 'shipped' then 1 else 0 end) as shippedCount, sum(case when o.fulfillment_status in ('after_sale', 'refunded') then 1 else 0 end) as afterSaleCount, ifnull(sum(o.total_quantity - o.shipped_quantity - o.refunded_quantity), 0) as pendingQuantity from erp_sales_order o

select sales_id as salesId, sales_no as salesNo, platform_order_no as platformOrderNo, main_order_no as mainOrderNo, shop_id as shopId, shop_name as shopName, customer_id as customerId, customer_name as customerName, source_type as sourceType, order_status as orderStatus, fulfillment_status as fulfillmentStatus, total_quantity as totalQuantity, shipped_quantity as shippedQuantity, refunded_quantity as refundedQuantity, pay_amount as payAmount, refund_amount as refundAmount, pay_time as payTime, data_sync_time as dataSyncTime, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, remark from erp_sales_order where sales_id = #{salesId}
select * from erp_sales_order where sales_id = #{salesId} for update

select item_id as salesItemId, sales_id as salesId, sales_no as salesNo, dwd_order_item_id as dwdOrderItemId, main_order_no as mainOrderNo, sub_order_no as subOrderNo, sku_id as skuId, sku_code as skuCode, sku_name as skuName, product_name as productName, quantity, shipped_quantity as shippedQuantity, refunded_quantity as refundedQuantity, greatest(quantity - shipped_quantity - refunded_quantity, 0) as pendingQuantity, pay_amount as payAmount, product_cost as productCost, item_status as itemStatus, version, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from erp_sales_order_item where sales_id = #{salesId} order by item_id
select * from erp_sales_order_item where item_id = #{salesItemId} for update

select shipment_id as shipmentId, shipment_no as shipmentNo, sales_id as salesId, sales_no as salesNo, main_order_no as mainOrderNo, package_no as packageNo, warehouse_id as warehouseId, warehouse_name as warehouseName, logistics_company as logisticsCompany, logistics_no as logisticsNo, shipment_status as shipmentStatus, shipped_time as shippedTime, shipped_by as shippedBy, signed_time as signedTime, cancel_by as cancelBy, cancel_time as cancelTime, cancel_reason as cancelReason, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, remark from erp_sales_shipment where sales_id = #{salesId} order by shipment_id desc

select shipment_item_id as shipmentItemId, shipment_id as shipmentId, shipment_no as shipmentNo, sales_item_id as salesItemId, sub_order_no as subOrderNo, sku_id as skuId, sku_code as skuCode, sku_name as skuName, quantity from erp_sales_shipment_item where shipment_id = #{shipmentId} order by shipment_item_id

select after_sale_id as afterSaleId, after_sale_no as afterSaleNo, sales_id as salesId, sales_item_id as salesItemId, sales_no as salesNo, main_order_no as mainOrderNo, sub_order_no as subOrderNo, sku_id as skuId, sku_code as skuCode, sku_name as skuName, quantity, after_sale_type as afterSaleType, after_sale_status as afterSaleStatus, refund_amount as refundAmount, return_warehouse_id as returnWarehouseId, return_warehouse_name as returnWarehouseName, reason, approve_by as approveBy, approve_time as approveTime, complete_by as completeBy, complete_time as completeTime, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, remark from erp_after_sale_order where sales_id = #{salesId} order by after_sale_id desc

select warehouse_id as warehouseId, warehouse_code as warehouseCode, warehouse_name as warehouseName, warehouse_type as warehouseType, warehouse_usage as warehouseUsage from erp_warehouse where status = '0' order by case when warehouse_type in ('physical', 'self') then 0 else 1 end, warehouse_id

select warehouse_id as warehouseId, warehouse_code as warehouseCode, warehouse_name as warehouseName, warehouse_type as warehouseType, warehouse_usage as warehouseUsage, allow_negative_stock as allowNegativeStock, status from erp_warehouse where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}

select ifnull(sum(si.quantity), 0) from erp_sales_shipment_item si inner join erp_sales_shipment s on s.shipment_id = si.shipment_id where si.sales_item_id = #{salesItemId} and s.shipment_status = 'draft'

select ifnull(sum(quantity), 0) as reservedQuantity, ifnull(sum(refund_amount), 0) as reservedAmount from erp_after_sale_order where sales_item_id = #{salesItemId} and after_sale_status in ('pending', 'approved')

select log_id as logId, sales_id as salesId, sales_item_id as salesItemId, biz_type as bizType, biz_no as bizNo, action_type as actionType, from_status as fromStatus, to_status as toStatus, operator_name as operatorName, action_time as actionTime, detail from erp_sales_fulfillment_log where sales_id = #{salesId} order by log_id desc limit 100
mapper.insert: insert into erp_sales_order( sales_no, platform_order_no, main_order_no, shop_id, shop_name, source_type, order_status, fulfillment_status, total_quantity, pay_amount, pay_time, data_sync_time, create_by, create_time, update_time ) select concat('SO-', substr(sha2(concat(x.shop_id, '|', x.main_order_no), 256), 1, 24)), x.main_order_no, x.main_order_no, x.shop_id, x.shop_name, 'dwd_sync', 'paid', 'pending', x.total_quantity, x.pay_amount, x.pay_time, sysdate(), 'system', sysdate(), sysdate() from ( select ifnull(d.shop_id, 0) shop_id, coalesce(nullif(d.main_order_no, ''), cast(d.order_id as char)) main_order_no, max(d.shop_name) shop_name, sum(ifnull(d.quantity, 0)) total_quantity, sum(ifnull(d.pay_amount, 0)) pay_amount, max(d.pay_time) pay_time from dwd_order_item d group by ifnull(d.shop_id, 0), coalesce(nullif(d.main_order_no, ''), cast(d.order_id as char)) ) x on duplicate key update shop_name = values(shop_name), pay_amount = values(pay_amount), pay_time = values(pay_time), data_sync_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()

insert into erp_sales_order_item( sales_id, sales_no, dwd_order_item_id, main_order_no, sub_order_no, sku_id, sku_code, sku_name, product_name, quantity, pay_amount, product_cost, item_status, create_time, update_time ) select o.sales_id, o.sales_no, d.order_item_id, o.main_order_no, coalesce(nullif(d.sub_order_no, ''), concat(o.main_order_no, '-', d.order_item_id)), d.sku_id, s.sku_code, d.sku_name, d.product_name, ifnull(d.quantity, 0), ifnull(d.pay_amount, 0), ifnull(d.product_cost, 0), 'paid', sysdate(), sysdate() from dwd_order_item d inner join erp_sales_order o on o.shop_id = ifnull(d.shop_id, 0) and o.main_order_no = coalesce(nullif(d.main_order_no, ''), cast(d.order_id as char)) left join erp_product_sku s on s.sku_id = d.sku_id on duplicate key update sku_code = values(sku_code), sku_name = values(sku_name), product_name = values(product_name), quantity = values(quantity), pay_amount = values(pay_amount), product_cost = values(product_cost), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.update: update erp_sales_order o left join ( select sales_id, sum(quantity) total_qty, sum(shipped_quantity) shipped_qty, sum(refunded_quantity) refunded_qty from erp_sales_order_item group by sales_id ) x on x.sales_id = o.sales_id set o.total_quantity = ifnull(x.total_qty, 0), o.shipped_quantity = ifnull(x.shipped_qty, 0), o.refunded_quantity = ifnull(x.refunded_qty, 0), o.update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select shipment_no as shipmentNo from erp_sales_shipment where idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey} limit 1

select shipment_id as shipmentId, shipment_no as shipmentNo, sales_id as salesId, sales_no as salesNo, main_order_no as mainOrderNo, warehouse_id as warehouseId, warehouse_name as warehouseName, logistics_company as logisticsCompany, logistics_no as logisticsNo, shipment_status as shipmentStatus, remark from erp_sales_shipment where shipment_no = #{shipmentNo} for update
mapper.insert: insert into erp_sales_shipment_item( shipment_id, shipment_no, sales_id, sales_item_id, sales_no, main_order_no, sub_order_no, sku_id, sku_code, sku_name, quantity, create_time ) values( #{shipmentId}, #{shipmentNo}, #{salesId}, #{salesItemId}, #{salesNo}, #{mainOrderNo}, #{subOrderNo}, #{skuId}, #{skuCode}, #{skuName}, #{quantity}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update erp_sales_shipment set shipment_status = #{toStatus}, version = version + 1, update_by = #{username}, update_time = sysdate(), shipped_time = if(#{toStatus} = 'shipped', sysdate(), shipped_time), shipped_by = if(#{toStatus} = 'shipped', #{username}, shipped_by), signed_time = if(#{toStatus} = 'signed', sysdate(), signed_time), cancel_by = if(#{toStatus} = 'canceled', #{username}, cancel_by), cancel_time = if(#{toStatus} = 'canceled', sysdate(), cancel_time), cancel_reason = if(#{toStatus} = 'canceled', #{reason}, cancel_reason) where shipment_no = #{shipmentNo} and shipment_status = #{fromStatus}

update erp_sales_order_item set shipped_quantity = shipped_quantity + #{quantity}, version = version + 1, update_time = sysdate() where item_id = #{salesItemId} and shipped_quantity + refunded_quantity + #{quantity} <= quantity
mapper.select: select after_sale_no as afterSaleNo from erp_after_sale_order where idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey} limit 1

select after_sale_id as afterSaleId, after_sale_no as afterSaleNo, sales_id as salesId, sales_item_id as salesItemId, after_sale_type as afterSaleType, after_sale_status as afterSaleStatus, quantity, refund_amount as refundAmount, return_warehouse_id as returnWarehouseId, return_warehouse_name as returnWarehouseName, reason, remark from erp_after_sale_order where after_sale_no = #{afterSaleNo} for update
mapper.insert: insert into erp_after_sale_order( after_sale_no, sales_id, sales_item_id, sales_no, main_order_no, sub_order_no, sku_id, sku_code, sku_name, quantity, after_sale_type, after_sale_status, amount, refund_amount, return_warehouse_id, return_warehouse_name, idempotency_key, reason, version, create_by, create_time, update_time, remark ) values( #{afterSaleNo}, #{salesId}, #{salesItemId}, #{salesNo}, #{mainOrderNo}, #{subOrderNo}, #{skuId}, #{skuCode}, #{skuName}, #{quantity}, #{afterSaleType}, 'pending', #{refundAmount}, #{refundAmount}, #{returnWarehouseId}, #{returnWarehouseName}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{reason}, 0, #{createBy}, sysdate(), sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update erp_after_sale_order set after_sale_status = #{toStatus}, version = version + 1, update_by = #{username}, update_time = sysdate(), approve_by = if(#{toStatus} = 'approved', #{username}, approve_by), approve_time = if(#{toStatus} = 'approved', sysdate(), approve_time), complete_by = if(#{toStatus} = 'completed', #{username}, complete_by), complete_time = if(#{toStatus} = 'completed', sysdate(), complete_time) where after_sale_no = #{afterSaleNo} and after_sale_status = #{fromStatus}

update erp_sales_order_item set refunded_quantity = refunded_quantity + #{quantity}, version = version + 1, update_time = sysdate() where item_id = #{salesItemId} and refunded_quantity + #{quantity} <= quantity

update dwd_order_item set refund_cost = ifnull(refund_cost, 0) + #{refundAmount}, profit_amount = ifnull(pay_amount, 0) - ifnull(product_cost, 0) - ifnull(platform_fee, 0) - ifnull(ad_cost, 0) - ifnull(freight_fee, 0) - (ifnull(refund_cost, 0) + #{refundAmount}) where order_item_id = #{dwdOrderItemId}

update erp_sales_order_item set item_status = case when refunded_quantity >= quantity then 'refunded' when shipped_quantity >= quantity - refunded_quantity then 'shipped' when shipped_quantity > 0 then 'partial_shipped' when refunded_quantity > 0 then 'partial_refunded' else 'paid' end, update_time = sysdate() where sales_id = #{salesId};

update erp_sales_order o inner join ( select i.sales_id, sum(i.quantity) total_qty, sum(i.shipped_quantity) shipped_qty, sum(i.refunded_quantity) refunded_qty, ifnull((select sum(a.refund_amount) from erp_after_sale_order a where a.sales_id = i.sales_id and a.after_sale_status = 'completed'), 0) refund_amount from erp_sales_order_item i where i.sales_id = #{salesId} group by i.sales_id ) x on x.sales_id = o.sales_id set o.total_quantity = x.total_qty, o.shipped_quantity = x.shipped_qty, o.refunded_quantity = x.refunded_qty, o.refund_amount = x.refund_amount, o.fulfillment_status = case when x.refunded_qty >= x.total_qty then 'refunded' when x.shipped_qty >= x.total_qty - x.refunded_qty then 'shipped' when x.shipped_qty > 0 then 'partial_shipped' when x.refunded_qty > 0 then 'after_sale' else 'pending' end, o.order_status = case when x.refunded_qty >= x.total_qty then 'refunded' when x.shipped_qty >= x.total_qty - x.refunded_qty then 'shipped' else o.order_status end, o.version = o.version + 1, o.update_time = sysdate() where o.sales_id = #{salesId}
